personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | ETL/ELT Pipelines | Cloud Data Platforms | Data Quality
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of experience designing and building scalable data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and cloud data platforms like Snowflake, Databricks, and Azure. Proficient in Python and SQL, I specialize in data modeling, data warehousing, and ensuring data quality for analytics and reporting. I have a proven track record of optimizing data lakes and automating workflows to enhance efficiency. Passionate about driving cross-functional collaboration to deliver reliable data solutions. I am excited to contribute to Loopback Health’s mission of supporting analytics and client solutions through innovative data engineering. My hands-on expertise aligns with creating scalable systems for healthcare data challenges.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL/ELT pipelines using Python and SQL, ingesting telemetry data from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing data reliability and delivery for analytics.
Designed optimized data models for historical retention and trend analysis, supporting executive reporting and forecasting in data warehousing environments.
Built data pipelines with PySpark for large-scale processing, ensuring data quality through cleansing and validation using pandas.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks, improving provisioning accuracy.
Integrated disparate data feeds into unified Oracle reporting systems with executive dashboards for stakeholder insights.
Automated workflows and reporting processes using Python scripts, driving efficiency in data transformation and delivery.

Analyzed bottlenecks and suggested performance improvements to maintain SLA requirements.
Provided dashboarding for end-to-end functionality and performance metrics analysis.
Supported mobile monitoring evaluations and integration of performance tools.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI). System orchestrates 10+ automated steps: semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered job scoring and tailoring, resume/cover letter generation, quality gating, and application tracking. Implemented multi-step agentic workflows with Claude Code and MCP server integration. Used RAG-style retrieval for semantic similarity matching across 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting processes with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine built on Python, PySpark, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard with real-time capacity insights and High Trust utilization scores.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed full serverless data platform using S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file problem using Snappy + Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Data mining user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.
